---
title: "Tyler_WorkingFile"
author: "me"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggthemes)
library(viridis)
library(ggjoy)
```

## R Markdown
